name: High Fantasy Epic
description: Classic heroic fantasy with ancient prophecies, kingdoms in peril, and escalating revelations.

text_areas.logline: A band of unlikely heroes rises as an ancient darkness awakens.
text_areas.setting: A fractured realm of rival houses, elder ruins, and fading magic.
text_areas.main_objective: Unite key factions before the final ritual is completed.
text_areas.stakes: If they fail, the realm is consumed by eternal night.

arcs.name: Arc I — Gathering Embers
arcs.summary: The party uncovers signs of a buried prophecy.
arcs.objective: Secure the first relic and identify allies.

arcs.name: Arc II — Kingdoms at the Brink
arcs.summary: Political tensions explode into open conflict.
arcs.objective: Broker alliances and expose the traitor network.

arcs.name: Arc III — The Last Seal
arcs.summary: The enemy launches the final phase of its plan.
arcs.objective: Reach the ritual site and decide the world’s future.
